name: Western Union
description_short: Nashville, TN's Western Union at 2615 Franklin Pike offers money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing services daily from 8AM to 9PM.
description_long:
Located at 2615 Franklin Pike in Nashville, TN, this Western Union branch operates as a standalone facility serving the local community. Open seven days a week from 8AM to 9PM, it provides convenient access to financial services whether you're a Nashville resident or just passing through. The location's extended hours make it accessible for morning transfers before work or evening transactions on weekends.

This Nashville Western Union location offers money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing services. You can reach the branch at +1 615-297-5517 to inquire about specific services or transfer limits. The staff can assist with domestic and international transfers, helping Nashville customers send money to family and friends reliably.

For Nashville residents needing to cash checks or send money quickly, bring a valid government-issued ID to the Franklin Pike location. Whether you're handling an emergency transfer or managing regular bill payments, this Western Union branch provides fast, secure processing. It's a straightforward option for basic financial services in Nashville.
pros: 500,000+ agent locations globally with major U.S. retail partnerships (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger)
24/7 online initiation with in-store completion option during agent business hours
Multi-language support including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Integrated services including money orders, bill payment, mobile top-ups, and inmate payments
Western Union Rewards program with referral incentives
Real-time transfer tracking and price estimation tools available online
Flexible payment options and ability to receive money on prepaid cards
cons: Fees not displayed transparently on website—requires separate price estimation tool, making cost comparison difficult
Limited transparency on exchange rates and transfer costs compared to digital competitors
Temporary service disruptions noted (Orange wallet unavailable during review)
Agent location hours vary significantly, limiting true 24/7 access despite online availability
Higher-cost option compared to digital money transfer apps and peer-to-peer services
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking cash pickup options
International remittance senders transferring money to family abroad
Consumers preferring in-person transactions with immediate cash access over digital-only services
Customers needing bill payment, money orders, or mobile top-ups at a single location
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international remittance senders who value physical location accessibility and cash-in-hand pickup over digital convenience and cost savings. The primary caveat is that Western Union operates as a premium-priced service; customers should compare fees against digital alternatives like PayPal, Wise, or peer-to-peer apps before committing, as actual transfer costs are not immediately transparent on their website.
meta_description: Western Union at 2615 Franklin Pike, Nashville, TN. Money transfers and check cashing services open 8AM-9PM daily.
